title: AWARDS
heading2: Validated by Industry Leaders and Experts
paragraph1: Before launching the project we vetted Nasun's concept/business model by winning over 10 grants and finishing as a finalist in XX competing with the most promising content startups in South Korea. Experts and leaders in the content/entertainment/gaming/business world have recognized the potential of Nasun.
paragraph2: We are proud of winning these # awards and grants. It took a lot of resources for our small team to win these contests competing against many established professionals in both the content and tech industries. What made these accomplishments even more meaningful was that we were always the only Web3 project. We had to convince leaders and experts in their respective industries that we were not interlopers or a crypto scam but offering a real, worthwhile vision for the future of content and gaming.
paragraph3: Even though it took energy and time we couldn't spare to apply for these grants, filling out extensive forms, getting vetted by government officials with office visits and interviews, prepping for pitches, going to pitch, and then waiting for results, we believe it was worth it to validate not only the quality of our narrative content and game but also the business model of Nasun.
paragraph4: Now for 2025, we made a conscious decision to focus on Nasun's public launch and not apply for any grants or awards this year. But we will resume full steam ahead for even bigger ones after our launch.
